full_text:
Yuan Long
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Long. An officer of Guan Yu, rebelled against Wu and killed by Lü Dai. Yuan Long was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Yuan Long lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
